topics.title: Celebrity Scandals and Listener Voicemails
topics.summary: The studio discusses the media coverage surrounding Peter Cook’s affair with a young woman, the public image of Christie Brinkley, and various listener voicemails regarding social media harassment and political commentary.

topics.title: Scott the Engineer's Reputation for Bad Luck
topics.summary: The studio discusses a local man's reputation for bringing misfortune to others, specifically regarding his impact on NASCAR driver Tony Stewart and the production of t-shirts for a diner.

topics.title: Riley Martin and Rockstar Supernova Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses Riley Martin’s frequent use of filler words, his complaints regarding payment, and the production quality of the reality show Rockstar Supernova.

topics.title: Howard TV Updates and New Staff
topics.summary: The studio discusses the expansion of Howard TV content, the addition of new producers from the film festival, and upcoming segments including a documentary on Blue Iris.

topics.title: Sean Penn Interview
topics.summary: The studio features Sean Penn discussing his career, including his roles in Private Parts and Sideways, as well as his experiences with various co-stars and the Academy Awards.

topics.title: Paul Giamatti on Acting and Fame
topics.summary: The studio explores Paul Giamatti's experiences with fame, his upcoming film roles, and the personal challenges of maintaining a private life while navigating the Hollywood industry.

topics.title: Film Career and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses a guest's film career, the details of a local news segment regarding a man's suicide over property disputes, and rumors surrounding celebrity divorces.

topics.title: Middle East Conflict and Celebrity Interviews
topics.summary: The studio discusses the geopolitical situation in Lebanon, takes several prank calls from a caller named Dave Letterman, and prepares to interview filmmaker Ivan Reitman and actor Luke Wilson.

topics.title: Luke Wilson on Hollywood Relationships
topics.summary: The studio features Luke Wilson discussing his experiences in the film industry, including a humorous story about being banned from the Playboy Mansion and his perspective on navigating relationships with co-stars.

topics.title: Promotion of My Super Ex-Girlfriend
topics.summary: The studio discusses the upcoming release of the film "My Super Ex-Girlfriend," featuring cast members' experiences on set, their personal lives, and the challenges of competing against other major releases.

topics.title: Luke Wilson and Movie Promotion
topics.summary: The studio discusses the upcoming release of "My Super Ex-Girlfriend," featuring Luke Wilson and Ivan Reitman, while also covering various news items including a local block party and a concert review.

topics.title: Hostile Religious Call and Fan Feedback
topics.summary: The studio plays a recording of a heated, profane exchange with a caller claiming to be a religious figure, followed by a discussion of listener feedback regarding recent segments.

topics.title: Dispute Over Harassing Phone Calls
topics.summary: The studio addresses allegations from Riley regarding a prank call to his home and discusses the logistics of staff payments and contract negotiations.

topics.title: Contract Negotiations and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio features a heated discussion regarding contract negotiations with Riley, allegations of unpaid fees, and a report on Pam Anderson’s upcoming marriage to Kid Rock.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio covers various topics including celebrity scandals involving the Cook family, reports on international conflicts in Lebanon, news regarding stem cell research and gay marriage legislation, and upcoming film releases.
